name: Urals Stampings Plant PAO
summary: Urals Stampings Plant PAO engages in the production and sale of hot stampings and forgings in Russia. The company offers a range of forgings for engineering industries, such as punching compressor and turbine disks for aircraft gas turbine engines; crankshafts, camshafts, and connecting rods for internal combustion engines and compressors; stamping for the fuselage; wings, landing gear, components, and assemblies of modern aircraft in rocket and space industry; axles and gear wheels traction transmission for railway traction and rolling stock; tires for trams; collar and flat flanges, discs of heat-resistant and titanium alloys; shut-off valves in the form of cases, caps, and balls; forgings for hunting and firearms; arms; torsion shafts and cross-pieces for the automotive industry; and blanks for the sling hook and hook cranes. It is also involved in the metal processing and steel production activities. Urals Stampings Plant PAO also exports its products to Bulgaria, Hungary, Germany, Romania, Turkey, France, the Czech Republic, the United States, Ukraine, Belarus, and Kazakhstan. The company was founded in 1942 and is headquartered in Chebarkul, Russia. Urals Stampings Plant PAO is a subsidiary of Mechel PAO.
